sections.title: What to test
items: One word per screen (across and down clues)
Clue list layout with letter boxes (no 2D grid)

exercises.title: A: Complete the crossword
exercises.instructions: Solve the crossword using the clues below.
exercises.studentInstruction: Type one letter in each box to complete the answer.

items.clue: The school football ...... meets every Wednesday after class. (4)

explanationContent.whyCorrect: The clue "The school football ___ meets every Wednesday after class." leads to the word "club".
explanationContent.vocabularyFocus: "club" (4 letters) matches the definition: The school football ___ meets every Wednesday after class.

wrongOptions.score: "score" is a different word from the crossword — check the clue definition again.
wrongOptions.train: "train" is a different word from the crossword — check the clue definition again.
wrongOptions.cheat: "cheat" is a different word from the crossword — check the clue definition again.

explanationContent.commonMistake: Count the letters in the clue (4) and spell "club" carefully.
explanationContent.usefulTip: Read the clue again — the definition points to one word with a fixed letter count.
